questions.clue: A. Philip Randolph, who first proposed a march on this city in 1941, also helped organize the one in 1963

Though his last name means "pertaining to a city", this "Defying Gravity" singer is a country superstar

This frontman of Hootie & the Blowfish went country with his solo album "Learn to Live"

final.clue: Made up of 1 large & many smaller islands, it's the most populous of Britain's remaining overseas territories
